user_query: On childs first day, add cinnamon toast crunch for breakfast

fields.name: Cinnamon Toast Crunch Bowl
fields.short_description: A kid-friendly breakfast bowl inspired by Cinnamon Toast Crunch — crunchy cinnamon-sugar cereal served with milk and fresh fruit for added nutrients.
fields.meal_suggestion: Pour a serving of cinnamon-sugar whole-grain cereal into a bowl. Add cold milk (dairy or fortified plant milk) and top with sliced banana or berries for fiber and vitamins. For extra protein, stir in a spoonful of Greek yogurt or a sprinkle of chopped nuts. Serve immediately to keep the cereal crunchy.

ingredients.name: honey or maple syrup (optional, small drizzle)

fields.nutrition_note: Provides quick carbohydrates for morning energy; using whole-grain cereal increases fiber. Adding milk and/or Greek yogurt boosts protein and calcium; fruit contributes vitamins, fiber, and natural sweetness. Keep added sweeteners minimal to limit excess sugar.

result.reasoning: Append to breakfast options (position -1) to offer a familiar, kid-friendly cereal bowl that complements the existing balanced choices and suits a child's preferences.
